title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
